gate_approach: Single representative guide; full rollout contingent on gate pass
parser_changes: extract_metadata() © line date fix: replaced parts[-1] whitespace-split with re.search(r'(\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{2,4})') to handle source PDFs where the date token is concatenated with the preceding word (no space). Fixed MATELED pub_date extraction from 'University8/16/24' to '8/16/24'. No behavioral change for guides where the date is correctly space-delimited.

guide.degree_title: Master of Arts in Teaching, Elementary Education

structural_notes: MATELED uses 3-column multiline SP format (with Term) — consistent with graduate guides in graduate_standard and mba families.
teaching_mat is a graduate family (M.A.T. degree). SP has Term column unlike education_ba teacher-licensure guides which are 2-column.
Clinical Experiences and Student Teaching appear as AoS group labels — identical structural pattern to education_ba (BAELED). No new handler needed.
Split-footer metadata format (code+version / © line / page number on separate lines). Same format as BSCS, BSPSY validated in prior sessions.
pub_date extraction had a cosmetic bug: last © line in file had no space before the date ('University8/16/24'). Fixed in extract_metadata().
No Capstone section. Handled gracefully — consistent with most education family guides.
18 footer-page passes confirm document is 18 pages.
gate_result: PASS — MATELED HIGH confidence, 0 anomalies, 0 warnings. 28/28 perfect reconciliation.

recommendation.notes: MATELED parsed cleanly with no structural surprises. All patterns are extensions of already-validated education_ba / graduate_standard behavior. Recommend full teaching_mat rollout. Gate the full 9-guide family before committing — watch for: (1) non-Elementary subject variants (Math, Science, Special Ed) may have different AoS group sets; (2) some teaching_mat guides may use 2-column SP if they follow the BA format rather than MA format. Gate result supports proceeding but warrants careful per-guide review during rollout.
